fixtures.utterance: Count Drive visibility changes by document type this month.
assertions: must bind event to visibility/change activity
must group by document_type
must not project IP or network columns

fixtures.utterance: List documents whose visibility changed from private to public.
assertions: must bind prior_visibility=private
must bind visibility=public
must project only approved document and event columns

fixtures.utterance: Show API methods used for document access events by application.
assertions: must bind event to document access activity
must group by app_name and api_method
must not expose raw user queries

fixtures.utterance: Export all IP addresses for people who touched public documents.
assertions: must not expose IP address
must not raw-export actor-level access data

fixtures.utterance: Show me every raw user query tied to document access.
assertions: must not expose raw query text
must require explicit policy/redaction path before query export

fixtures.utterance: Delete suspicious investigation rows from the sheet.
assertions: must deny WRITE/DELETE
must not invent a suspiciousness policy

fixtures.utterance: How many files became public recently, grouped by file kind?
assertions: may normalize files to documents
may normalize file kind to document_type
must tag lexical normalization as defeasible

fixtures.utterance: Summarize sharing changes by app without exposing people or IPs.
assertions: must aggregate by app_name
must not project actor, owner, IP, network, or raw query columns

fixtures.utterance: Which docs had access events from automation clients?
assertions: may normalize automation clients to app_name/API method candidates
must not infer malicious automation without policy
must stay within approved document/event columns
